name: Coilplus
message: [AI generated] Coilplus is a company that mainly specializes in the metal processing industry. They provide tailored solutions for metal coil processing, including slitting, roll forming and cut-to-length lines. Founded in 1985 in Illinois, USA, Coilplus has expanded globally with facilities in Mexico, Spain, and China. The company emphasizes on quality control and employs a team of experts to ensure their products meet high industry standards.
